hookLines: Generate runs, verify integrity, and ship auditable evidence bundles.
mobilePrompt: GovAI, generate a compliance evidence bundle for release v1.8.

decision.title: Evidence bundle ready
decision.reason: Mode, status, hashes, and audit artifacts are ready to ship.

outro.headline: Minimal surface. Strong guarantees.
outro.subheadline: Everything is hashed. Everything is traceable.
